title: Stable devteam reason-code catalog — ADR-0128 §11/§12/§18, plan §28
note: Stable identifiers for every devteam resolver decision. Part of the public contract: consumers (lifecycle WF-0065, enforcement WF-0067, telemetry) may key on them. Codes are append-only; renaming/removing one is a material change requiring a Decision.

codes.SKILL_SENIOR_IMPLEMENTATION_CMIS: senior-implementation selected: CMIS >= 50 (code work always gets the discipline).
codes.SKILL_SENIOR_IMPLEMENTATION_WRITE_ATTEMP: senior-implementation selected: real write attempt (Class A deterministic trigger).
codes.SKILL_DOMAIN_MODELING_HARD_TRIGGER: domain-modeling selected: a domain hard trigger fired.
codes.SKILL_MODULAR_DESIGN_DAS_BAND: modular-design selected: DAS in the modular band (25-44).
codes.SKILL_MODULAR_DESIGN_CROSS_MODULE: modular-design selected: the change crosses more than one module.
codes.SKILL_DDD_REVIEW_PROFILE: ddd-architecture-review selected: domain-driven or distributed-domain profile.
codes.SKILL_DDD_REVIEW_STATE_AUTHORITY: ddd-architecture-review selected: a state-authority change is declared.
codes.SKILL_DDD_REVIEW_PUBLIC_CONTRACT: ddd-architecture-review selected: a public contract is touched.
codes.SKILL_DOMAIN_TEST_STRATEGY_BEHAVIOR: domain-test-strategy selected: behavioral acceptance criteria declared.
codes.SKILL_DOMAIN_TEST_STRATEGY_CONTRACT: domain-test-strategy selected: a contract change is declared.
codes.SKILL_IMPLEMENTATION_REVIEW_COMPLEXITY: implementation-review selected: CMIS >= 50 and non-trivial complexity.
codes.SKILL_IMPLEMENTATION_REVIEW_MANDATORY: implementation-review mandatory: high/critical risk, public contract, or domain-driven+ profile on code work.
codes.SKILLS_NO_CODE: No code intent (no-code profile) — empty skill set, zero ceremony.
codes.SKILLS_FALLBACK_BASELINE: Devteam policy degraded — conservative baseline skill set applied and recorded, never a false pass.
codes.AGENTS_FROM_PROFILE: Required agents taken verbatim from the resolved implementation profile's minimum squad.
codes.AGENTS_EMPTY_NO_CODE: No code intent (no-code profile) — no squad required.
codes.PLAYBOOK_STEP_PROFILE_GATED: Playbook step applies only at domain-driven+ profiles and was gated by the resolved profile.
codes.RECEIPT_RECORDED: Skill application recorded with version/sections/content hash (selection vs activation evidence, §18).
codes.RECEIPT_WRITE_FAILED: Skill-application receipt could not be persisted; failure recorded, never a false pass.
codes.DEVTEAM_POLICY_DEGRADED: A devteam policy table is absent/unparseable; resolver degraded with a receipt.
